ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock ticker */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "inst_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of shares held by institutional investors */,
  "insider_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of shares held by insiders */,
  "market_sector" TEXT /* Market sector or industry of the stock */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the stock */,
  "historical_price" TEXT /* Historical market price data (e.g., 52-week high, 52-week low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insider_trading" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider trading record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the insider trading activity */,
  "trading_type" TEXT /* Type of insider trading activity (e.g., buy, sell, option exercise) */,
  "shares_involved" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the insider trading activity */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the insider trading activity */,
  "net_insider_l12m" TEXT /* Net insider trading activity over the last 12 months */,
  "net_insider_l3m" TEXT /* Net insider trading activity over the last 3 months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_trading_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, researcher) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., insider trading, institutional ownership, market trends) */,
  "report_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the report (e.g., sector analysis, company analysis) */,
  "report_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view report, generate report) */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
